title: JonaPoka's Better Vanilla
description: Filling the gaps that Mojang left behind
body:
![JonaPoka's Better Vanilla](https://i.imgur.com/DKSHYwz.png)

**Filling the Gaps that Mojang Left Behind!**

Are you ready for a Minecraft experience like no other? Look no further than JonaPoka's Better Vanilla modpack! This carefully crafted collection of mods aims to transform Minecraft into an exciting sequel while still preserving that authentic vanilla feel. Prepare to be amazed as you dive into a world where quality-of-life improvements and performance enhancements seamlessly blend with the core gameplay. It's like asking yourself, "Why wasn't this already part of the vanilla game?"

**What's in the Modpack?**

JonaPoka's Better Vanilla is meticulously designed to enhance your gameplay in ways you never thought possible. Delve into a plethora of new features, adjustments, and surprises that will leave you wondering how you ever played Minecraft without them. With this modpack, you'll experience Minecraft in a whole new light.

**Features:**
- Quality-of-life changes that streamline your Minecraft adventures.
- Performance optimizations to ensure smoother gameplay.
- Additional content that expands upon the vanilla experience.
- Bug fixes and enhancements that Mojang overlooked.

**Experience Minecraft Like Never Before!**

Prepare yourself for an unforgettable journey that revitalizes the way you play Minecraft. Whether you're a seasoned veteran or a new player, JonaPoka's Better Vanilla will captivate your imagination and keep you coming back for more.

### Credits:

This modpack is heavily inspired from the mods [flowstate](https://www.youtube.com/@flowstatevideo) uses and his vanilla+ modpack.

This modpack uses [Complementary Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) shaderpack for an optimal experience.
